untranslatable_reason: Signal requires measurement of candle height relative to breakout price and comparison to median threshold—neither 'breakout price' nor 'median threshold' are available indicators. The pattern classification logic (tall vs. short candle based on ratio) and context-dependent breakout direction determination cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. Exit target calculation requires dynamic reference to entry candle height, which requires state tracking not supported in this rule format.
translation_notes: Gravestone Doji identified by small body and short upper wick relative to lower wick. However, the core signal logic—dividing candle height by breakout price and comparing to median—cannot be translated. Success rates extracted: bullish 7.20%, bearish 10.27%. Stop loss set to observed failure rate (5.95% bullish). The signal is inherently context-dependent and requires custom backtester logic for proper implementation.
